overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth video game showing a bald protagonist approaching and entering a rustic tropical bar called 'Farah's' at night. The character moves through an outdoor dirt courtyard with various NPCs, enters through a beaded curtain into a commercial kitchen, and proceeds into a dimly lit dining room.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dirt courtyard of Farah's bar with fire barrels and string lights

events.description: companion character stops walking and raises hand in a gesturing motion
approaching the wooden porch and entrance steps of Farah's bar

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the outdoor courtyard toward Farah's bar entrance, holding a flaming torch

notable_agents.action: companion character walking alongside then stopping to gesture toward the bar
group of locals standing and conversing near the entrance steps

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'FARAH'S' mounted above the entrance
rustic two-story wooden structure with porch and railings
burning metal barrel providing orange ambient light
decorative bulbs strung across the courtyard
wooden bar structure with stools on the porch

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through an open dirt courtyard at night, approaching a rustic wooden bar named 'Farah's' identified by an illuminated sign. The area is lit by fire barrels and string lights, with several NPCs standing around. A companion walks alongside initially but stops to gesture as the character continues toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial kitchen with stainless steel appliances and prep stations

events.description: passing through beaded curtain doorway into the kitchen interior
character stops briefly to observe chef chopping vegetables before moving to the other side of the kitchen

agents.ego_description: entering the kitchen through a beaded curtain and observing the chefs at work while holding a torch

notable_agents.action: chef in white uniform chopping vegetables at a metal prep station
second chef working at the sink area in the background

entered.detail: doorway curtain made of hanging beads separating kitchen from exterior porch
large stainless steel cooking range with pots and exhaust hood
metal island counter with cutting board, pineapple, and chopped vegetables
double basin stainless steel sink with chef working

segments.scene_description: The character enters the kitchen through a beaded curtain, transitioning from the outdoor courtyard to a warm, artificially lit interior with wooden floors. Two chefs in white uniforms work at their stations—one chopping vegetables at a prep table, the other at a sink. The character moves through the space, passing a large commercial stove and various kitchen equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: casual dining room with plastic furniture and tropical decor

events.description: exiting kitchen through doorway into the dining room area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dining area past seated customers and a waiter cleaning tables

notable_agents.action: waiter in white uniform wiping down a plastic table
customers seated at a table eating and conversing

entered.detail: white plastic tables with condiment bottles scattered throughout the room
large framed artwork depicting colorful flowers and foliage
rotating fan mounted on the ceiling providing air circulation
white and green plastic chairs around the dining tables

segments.scene_description: The character exits the kitchen into a dimly lit dining room with wooden floors and tropical wall art. White plastic tables and chairs are arranged throughout the space, with a few customers seated and eating. A waiter cleans a table on the right as the character walks toward the front of the restaurant, passing under a ceiling fan.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling outdoor courtyard into the warm, enclosed interior of a rustic tropical bar. It begins at night in a dirt courtyard lit by fire barrels and string lights, following the protagonist as they leave a gesturing companion behind to approach the illuminated sign of Farah's. As the character passes through a beaded curtain, the scene shifts from the open night air to the artificial warmth of a commercial kitchen, moving past chefs at work and large cooking equipment. The camera then glides out of the kitchen and into a dimly lit dining room characterized by tropical wall art and white plastic furniture. Finally, the movement continues past seated customers and a cleaning waiter, passing under a ceiling fan as the character advances toward the front of the restaurant.
